I am a space ninja sliding across the floor at mach speed while grinding for a very specific piece of prime metal.
Every wall is waist-high and perfect for taking cover while I shoot aliens with an assault rifle that has a chainsaw attached to it.
I stole an experimental machine gun jetpack and am currently dodging lasers and missiles in an endless laboratory.
I am just a chicken trying to hop across a highway without getting flattened by a speeding semi-truck.
Slicing strings to drop candy into the mouth of a hungry little green monster. Physics is hard.
An anime fighting game where the soundtrack goes incredibly hard and the character designs make no practical sense.
Sending a single peasant to build a castle right next to my enemy's town while a priest goes 'Wololo'.
Survived a plane crash only to be hunted by creepy cannibals. I responded by building a luxury treehouse.
I tried to build a rocket to go to the moon, but it flipped upside down and exploded on the launchpad. The little green men are terrified.
I crashed on a planet and immediately started polluting it with massive conveyor belts and automated factories. The bugs are angry.
A hipster teenager gets time-travel powers and uses them to fix awkward conversations and save her punk best friend.
I am an android sent by CyberLife, and I have to make a thousand quick-time choices to prevent a robot uprising.
One minute I am uncovering a serious criminal conspiracy, the next I am managing a real estate empire and singing karaoke.
Saving a fantasy world from a demonic blight, but mostly just arguing with my party members at the campsite.
A hacker with a magic smartphone that can change traffic lights, explode steam pipes, and steal money from pedestrians.
